ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product available in stock */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor selling the product */,
  "origin" TEXT /* The region or country of origin for the product */,
  "cultural_significance" TEXT /* A brief description of the cultural significance of the product */,
  "environmental_significance" TEXT /* A brief description of the environmental significance of the product */,
  "is_certified_organic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is certified organic */,
  "is_fair_trade" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is fair trade */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* The average rating of the product based on customer reviews */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* The number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the category icon */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the vendor's website */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vendor is verified */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* The average rating of the vendor based on customer feedback */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* The number of reviews for the vendor */,
  "business_license" TEXT /* URL to the vendor's business license */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the vendor's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "is_activated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is activated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "is_gift" INTEGER /* Indicates if the order is a gift */,
  "gift_message" TEXT /* A message to be included with the gift */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* The expected delivery date of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* The tax amount for the product in the order */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* The discount amount for the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment has been refunded */,
  "refund_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the refund, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the review was created */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is approved by the admin */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the review, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being promoted */,
  "promotion_type" TEXT /* Type of promotion (e.g., percentage off, fixed amount off) */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the promotion is active */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* A unique code for the promotion */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* The number of times the promotion has been used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in inventory */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor supplying the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level at which to trigger a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last stock check */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* The date of the last order placed for the product */,
  "next_delivery_date" TEXT /* The expected date of the next delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who added the product to their wishlist */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the wishlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added to the wishlist */,
  "is_purchased" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product has been purchased from the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carts" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who added the product to their cart */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added to the cart */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* A unique session ID for the cart */,
  "is_saved_for_later" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cart is saved for later */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
